response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a versatile technical background, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ on Windows and capital markets/fixed income domains. His profile is more suited to web, mobile, and general software development rather than the specialized financial systems this role demands.
strengths: Extensive experience with modern software development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
Strong communication skills and a track record of knowledge sharing through workshops and talks.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks, indicating adaptability.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, especially on Windows (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments).
No evident experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domains.
Primary expertise lies in full-stack web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which is not a focus for this role.
